titles: Lytic Bone Lesion: Giant Cell-Rich Differential

dependencies: Lecture and algorithm services import shared types from `../types`.
Tutorial content is embedded as HTML-rich section definitions in `services/tutorialContent.ts`.
Histology content is embedded as a typed image manifest in `services/histologyImageService.ts`.
The root `public/algorithms.json` and `public/data/algorithms.json` are both present and were both staged because they are not byte-identical artifacts.
gaps: No separate histology JSON corpus exists in this repo; the histology payload is authored inline in TypeScript.
The raw network JSON does not expose an `extended` array in the staged file, so extended graph content is not represented there.
